category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (PPE mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 2890) to Laos market (DOSM conformity certification, MEM / EDL procurement requirements).

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos PPE Respirator (Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626, GB 2890) documentation against Laos requirements under DOSM mandatory conformity certification, MEM and EDL procurement standards, national-language labelling obligations, and the absence of a horizontal RoHS regime in Laos.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626、GB 2890）文件与老挝要求对照，涵盖DOSM强制合格认证、能源矿产部及老挝国家电力公司采购标准、国家语言标签义务，以及老挝缺乏横向RoHS制度的实际情况。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626、GB 2890）文件與寮國要求對照，涵蓋DOSM強制合格認證、能源礦產部及寮國國家電力公司採購標準、國家語言標籤義務，以及寮國缺乏橫向RoHS制度的實際情況。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Lao regulations, DOSM certification requirements, and destination-country market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Laos regulatory frameworks are evolving; always confirm with DOSM directly.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行老挝法规、DOSM认证要求及目的地国市场监督实践。老挝法规框架持续发展，请直接与DOSM确认最新要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行寮國法規、DOSM認證要求及目的地國市場監督實踐。寮國法規框架持續發展，請直接與DOSM確認最新要求。

answer_first.en: PPE respirators exported from China to Laos require DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology) mandatory conformity certification for regulated goods. Laos applies GOST/IEC-based MS (Lao National Standards) as reference standards. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports alone are not sufficient — a DOSM certification or recognised third-party conformity assessment is required. Laos has no horizontal RoHS regime; hazardous substance restrictions do not apply on the same basis as in the EU. National-language (Lao-script) labelling is required for goods sold in the Lao market. Transit is typically via Thailand or Vietnam.
answer_first.zh: 从中国出口至老挝的PPE呼吸器须取得老挝标准计量局（DOSM）的强制合格认证。老挝以GOST/IEC为基础的MS（老挝国家标准）作为参考标准。仅凭中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不足够——须取得DOSM认证或认可第三方合格评定结论。老挝没有横向RoHS制度，有害物质限制不适用与欧盟相同的基准。在老挝市场销售的商品须提供老挝文字的国家语言标签。货物通常经泰国或越南过境转运。
answer_first.zht: 從中國出口至寮國的PPE呼吸器須取得寮國標準計量局（DOSM）的強制合格認證。寮國以GOST/IEC為基礎的MS（寮國國家標準）作為參考標準。僅憑中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不足夠——須取得DOSM認證或認可第三方合格評定結論。寮國沒有橫向RoHS制度，有害物質限制不適用與歐盟相同的基準。在寮國市場銷售的商品須提供寮文的國家語言標籤。貨物通常經泰國或越南過境轉運。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or upon DOSM regulatory update
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
